uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report: signed centi-degC 0x0866=2150 -> 21.50. expected.data verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable temperature_1 = 21.5).
Synthetic in-bounds standard report: unsigned centi-% 0x157C=5500 -> 55.00. expected.data verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable humidity_1 = 55).

uplink.description: standard report: CO2 on endpoint 1 (cluster 0x800C) -> air.co2
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report on ZCL endpoint 1 (frame-control 0x21): concentration 0x028A=650 ppm. Upstream labels cluster 0x800C as CO2 only when endpoint==1; expected.data verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable CO2 = 650).

uplink.description: standard report: IAQ index on endpoint 0 (cluster 0x800C) -> iaq extra
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds standard report on ZCL endpoint 0 (frame-control 0x11): concentration 0x0050=80. Upstream labels cluster 0x800C as IAQ when endpoint==0; the vocabulary does not model IAQ, so it is surfaced as the camelCase extra `iaq`. Value verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable IAQ = 80).
Synthetic in-bounds standard report: signed16 hPa 0x03F5=1013 (atmospheric, vocabulary bound 900-1100). expected.data verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (variable pressure = 1013).

uplink.description: standard report: power config disposable source (cluster 0x0050 attr 6) -> battery volts
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds power report: presence flags 0x04 (disposable), mV 0x0E10=3600 -> 3.6 V. expected.data value verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (disposable_battery_voltage = 3.6).

uplink.description: config frame: firmware version (command 0x01, cluster 0x0000 attr 2) -> firmware extra
uplink._note: TTN-example-shaped config frame (payload 110100000002000D0305020015E2): three decimal octets 3.5.2 then 24-bit build 0x0015E2=5602. Verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (firmware = '3.5.2.5602').

uplink.description: config frame: dataup message type (command 0x01, cluster 0x8004 attr 0) -> messageType extra
uplink._note: TTN-example-shaped config frame (payload 110180040000000800): value byte 0 -> unconfirmed. Verified by running reference/upstream-codec.js (message_type = 'unconfirmed').

uplink.description: error: proprietary batch frame (frame-control bit0 clear) is out of scope
uplink._note: Synthetic batch-frame prefix (frame-control 0x30, bit0 clear). This codec decodes only standard reports; batch frames -> error.
Watteco ZCL reports are carried on fPort 125; any other port is rejected.
